rq2_drivers.metric_formula: driver_score = sqrt(sum_v w_v*(r_v-r_bar)^2 / sum_v w_v), r_v=flips_v/total_v, w_v=total_v

rq2_drivers.metric_note: Higher score means changing this knob shifts flip-rate behavior more across its values.
